name: clifford-number
description: The Clifford Number: a surface-hop topology compiler for mapping bounded legitimate surfaces, plausible deniability, and recurring public-private AI policy machinery.

scripts.check: npm run compile && npm run validate:release && npm test
scripts.legacy:test: node test/graph.test.js && node test/mcp-server.test.js && node test/update-sweep.test.js
